concerns.text: T015 ('Integrate novel object generation with evaluation loop') is marked [X] (complete) but explicitly contains the comment '<!-- FAILED: unspecified -->'. This task consumes the artifacts produced by T007a (generation execution). Since T007a is marked [ ] (incomplete), T015 cannot logically be complete. This violates the 'Producer before consumer' dependency rule, creating a broken data-flow where the evaluation loop has no defined input source.

T007a ('Execute generator.py to produce... geometry files') is marked [ ] (incomplete) and depends on T007. However, T007 ('Create NovelObjectSet generator class') is marked [X] (complete). The execution task (T007a) is a distinct producer of the 'NovelObjectSet' artifact required by FR-003 and consumed by T015/T013. The current ordering implies the class exists but the data artifact does not, yet downstream tasks (T015) are marked complete. This breaks the artifact-flow dependency chain for the core evaluation dataset.

T029 ('Run full end-to-end benchmark... assert wall-clock time <= 6h') is marked [ ] (incomplete). This task is the sole consumer of the performance metrics required to validate SC-003 and SC-004. It depends on the completion of T026 (generator optimization), T027 (train optimization), and T028 (CUDA checks). While T029 is correctly placed at the end, its incomplete status combined with the incomplete T007a (data generation) means the 'CPU-Tractable Inference Pipeline' (US3) cannot be verified as a shippable unit, violating the 'User-story groups' independence requirement.

T009 ('Setup state tracking...') and T009a ('Implement checksum verification...') are split. T009a is marked [ ] (incomplete) while T009 is [ ]. Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires checksums for `data/raw` and `data/generated`. The dependency chain is unclear: does T009 (state file setup) require T009a (checksum logic) to be functional first? The current parallel marking [P] on T009a suggests it might be independent, but logically, the state tracking (T009) is useless without the verification logic (T009a) to populate it. This is a semantic ordering ambiguity.
